existing_features.title: Add an optional 'Initial Balance' numeric input field to the CreateFundDialog form, allowing users to specify a custom starting amount when creating a new fund.
Update the useCreateFund mutation hook in useQueries.ts to pass the optional initialBalance value from the dialog form to the backend createFund call.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add custom amount to newly created funds

Update the backend createFund handler (or equivalent fund creation logic in main.mo) to accept an optional initial balance parameter. If provided and greater than zero, automatically record an initial inflow transaction against the newly created fund so the balance reflects the custom amount.
